PRVDR_LCTN_ACTV_IND_12 
LABEL: 
Provider Location Active Indicator — January through December 
DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate the provider’s location information specified in the unique combination of location 
variables (was active in the given month. Each of 12 months.
SHORT NAME: 

PRVDR_LCTN_ACTV_IND_01 
PRVDR_LCTN_ACTV_IND_02 
PRVDR_LCTN_ACTV_IND_03 
PRVDR_LCTN_ACTV_IND_04 
PRVDR_LCTN_ACTV_IND_05 
PRVDR_LCTN_ACTV_IND_06 
PRVDR_LCTN_ACTV_IND_07 
PRVDR_LCTN_ACTV_IND_08
